text:
Once upon a time in a small town, a boy named Tim loved birds. He watched them swoop and migrate every year. And every holiday.

One year, a big predator owl moved into town. No ordinary owl. Everyone said it could kill anything. Everyone feared it.

Tim didn't fear just ordinary things. One time, he climbed up a tree an owl perched. Suddenly the owl swooped. Tim flew out. No branch was wide enough.

Back home. Owls everywhere. He sat quietly. Maybe tomorrow. Surely not.

When the big owl woke up.
